blocks.name: Navbar
blocks.description: Responsive navigation bar with logo, links, and mobile menu.

blocks.name: Hero
blocks.description: Full-width hero section with heading, subheading, description, image, and call-to-action.

blocks.name: Features
blocks.description: Grid of feature cards with icon, title, and description.

blocks.name: Content
blocks.description: Rich text content section for long-form prose.

blocks.name: Stats
blocks.description: Row of key statistics with numbers and labels.

blocks.name: Details
blocks.description: Split layout with text on one side and media on the other.

blocks.name: Team
blocks.description: Team member grid with photos, names, roles, and social links.

blocks.name: Timeline
blocks.description: Vertical timeline of events with dates, titles, and descriptions.

blocks.name: Testimonials
blocks.description: Customer testimonials with quote, author name, role, and avatar.

blocks.name: Logos
blocks.description: Client or partner logo strip with optional heading.

blocks.name: Pricing
blocks.description: Pricing tier cards with features, price, and CTA button.

blocks.name: Comparison
blocks.description: Feature comparison table across plans or products.

blocks.name: CTA
blocks.description: Call-to-action section with heading, description, and action button.

blocks.name: Contact
blocks.description: Contact form with name, email, message fields and optional map.

blocks.name: Newsletter
blocks.description: Email signup section with heading, description, and input field.

blocks.name: Gallery
blocks.description: Image gallery grid with optional lightbox.

blocks.name: Blog List
blocks.description: Grid or list of blog post cards with title, excerpt, date, and image.

blocks.name: Footer
blocks.description: Site footer with columns, links, social icons, and copyright.
